_description: Annotations for full-fidelity conversation records. These are complete conversations that were never compacted — used to test how well the full compaction pipeline (boundary logic + summarizer) would handle them.

_fields.task_complete: Was the task finished at the end of the conversation?
_fields.must_contain: Regex patterns for facts that must survive in the summary.
_fields.conversation_type: Type of conversation: browser, coding, desktop, mixed.

3ad4d39b.notes: 160-message flight search via browser agent. Single user request to find flights AUS to Chicago for all April weekends. Agent found prices for 3 valid weekends and rejected one. Tests browser page snapshot dedup and fact extraction from navigation-heavy conversations.

f50c3081.notes: 161-message coding session. Built a PIL rigging system for game characters, fixed wing attachment, then created a cyberpunk side-scroller demo. 60 empty assistant messages, 71 tool calls — tests tool cap impact when assistant doesn't narrate results.
